name: codex-agent-team
description: Hybrid Codex team workflow with lead/member agents, spec-driven skills, review-cycle guidance, and local prompt shortcuts.

interface.longDescription: A Codex workflow bundle with GPT-5.6-oriented team skills, prompt shortcuts, and bounded review loops that pairs with the repo's role-specific custom agents.
defaultPrompt: Plan this work with the Codex hybrid team
Break this feature into parallel coding, devops, review, and architecture scopes
Turn this idea into a `.codex/specs` plan
Review this AWS design or IaC with `$aws-security-guidelines`
Use `$git-workflow` to prepare a safe branch, diff, commit, or PR handoff
